creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
I did try to build today's update and I got:

===>>> Launching child to install graphics/hugin

===>>> All >> graphics/hugin (2/2)

===>>> Currently installed version: hugin-2013.0.0_7
===>>> Port directory: /usr/ports/graphics/hugin

===>>> Starting check for build dependencies
===>>> Gathering dependency list for graphics/hugin from ports
===>>> Dependency check complete for graphics/hugin

===>>> All >> hugin-2013.0.0_7 (2/2)

===>  Cleaning for hugin-2015.0.0_1
===>  Found saved configuration for hugin-2013.0.0_2
===>   hugin-2015.0.0_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by hugin-2015.0.0_1 for building
===>  Extracting for hugin-2015.0.0_1
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for hugin-2015.0.0.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for hugin-2015.0.0_1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for hugin-2015.0.0_1
File to patch: 

It asked me all the time of "File to patch:"
\
